title: Logicqualification
body:
Command: SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:WINdow:LOGICQUALification
Description: This command specifies or queries whether or not to use logic qualification for a window search. The search number is specified by x.
Category: Search and Mark

title: Polarity
body:
Command: SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:WINdow:POLarity
Description: This command sets or queries the window trigger threshold crossing of the selected trigger Source. The search number is specified by x.
Category: Search and Mark

title: Source
body:
Command: SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:WINdow:SOUrce
Description: This command sets and queries the source for the window search input. The search number is specified by x.
Category: Search and Mark

title: High
body:
Command: SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:WINdow:THReshold:HIGH
Description: This command sets or queries the source threshold HIGH level for a transition trigger search to determine where to place a mark. The search number is specified by x.
Category: Search and Mark

title: Low
body:
Command: SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:WINdow:THReshold:LOW
Description: This command sets or queries the source threshold LOW level for a transition trigger search to determine where to place a mark. The search number is specified by x.
Category: Search and Mark

title: When
body:
Command: SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:WINdow:WHEn
Description: This command sets or queries the window search event. The search number is specified by x.
Category: Search and Mark

title: Width
body:
Command: SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:WINdow:WIDth
Description: This command sets or queries the width setting for a window trigger search to determine where to place a mark. The search number is specified by x.
Category: Search and Mark

title: Selected
body:
Command: SEARCH:SELected
Description: This command sets or queries the selected search, for example SEARCH1. The search number is specified by x.
Category: Search and Mark

title: Addnew
body:
Command: SEARCHTABle:ADDNew
Description: This command adds a new search event table.
Category: Search and Mark

title: Delete
body:
Command: SEARCHTABle:DELete
Description: This command deletes a search event table.
Category: Search and Mark

title: List
body:
Command: SEARCHTABle:list?
Description: This command queries all search event tables.
Category: Search and Mark

title: Trigger
body:
Command: TRIGger
Description: This command forces a trigger event to occur. The query returns the current trigger parameters for the instrument.
Category: Trigger

title: Reset}
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B|B:RESET}
Description: This command sets the A, B, or B Reset trigger level automatically to 50% of the range of the minimum and maximum values of the trigger input signal. The query returns current trigger parameters. The trigger level is the voltage threshold
through which the trigger source signal must pass to generate a trigger event. This command is equivalent to pushing the LEVEL knob on the front panel.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:CONDition
Description: This command specifies a field or condition for an ARINC429 bus to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:DATa:HIVALue
Description: This command sets or queries the high value when trigger on an ARINC429 data field. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to DATa or LABELANDDATA, and the data qualifier must be INrange or OUTrange.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:DATa:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to be used when triggering on data in the DATA field for an ARINC429 bus signal. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to DATa or LABELANDDATA.
BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:DATAFORmat)
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:DATa:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the low value when triggering on an ARINC429 data field. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to DATa or LABELANDDATA.
Category: Trigger

title: Errtype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:ERRTYPe
Description: This command sets or queries the error type when triggering on an ARINC429 bus signal. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to ERRor.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:LABel:HIVALue
Description: This command sets or queries the high value when triggering on an ARINC429 label field. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to LABel, and the label qualifier must be INrange or OUTrange.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:LABel:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to be used when triggering on label data for an ARINC429 bus signal. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to LABel or LABELANDDATA.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:LABel:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the low value when triggering on an ARINC429 label field. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to LABel or LABELANDDATA.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:SDI:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the label when triggering on an ARINC429 SDI field. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to DATa or LABELANDDATA, and the data format must be set to DATA.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ARINC429A:SSM:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the label value when triggering on an ARINC429 SSM field. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to DATa or LABELANDDATA, and the data format must be set to DATA or SDIDATA.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:CONDition
Description: This command sets the condition (word select, start of frame, or matching data) to be used when triggering on an audio bus signal. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hitdmvalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:DATa:HITDMVALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary data string for the high data word to be used when triggering on an TDM audio bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to DATa using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:CONDition.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:DATa:HIVALue
Description: This command sets the upper word value to be used when triggering on an audio bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to DATA using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:CONDition.
The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Offset
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:DATa:OFFSet
Description: This command sets the data offset value to be used when triggering on an audio bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to DATa using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:CONDition.
The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:DATa:QUALifier
Description: This command sets the qualifier to be used when triggering on an audio bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to DATa using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:CONDition.
The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Tdmvalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:DATa:TDMVALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary data string for the single or low data word to be used when triggering on an TDM audio bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to DATa using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B{x}:AUDio:CONDition.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:DATa:VALue
Description: This command sets the lower word value to be used when triggering on an audio bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to DATa using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:CONDition.
The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Word
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:DATa:WORD
Description: This command sets the alignment of the data (left, right or either) to be used to trigger on an audio bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to DATa using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:AUDio:CONDition.
The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:CONDition
Description: This command sets the condition (start of frame, frame type, identifier, matching data, EOF, missing ACK field, bit-stuffing error) to be used when triggering on a CAN bus signal. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Direction
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:DATa:DIRection
Description: This command sets the data direction (read, write or “nocare”) to be used to search on a CAN bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to IDentifier (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Offset
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:DATa:OFFSet
Description: This command sets or queries the data offset value, in bytes, to use when triggering on the CAN data field. The bus number is specified by
x. The trigger condition must be set to DATA or IDANDDATA.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:DATa:QUALifier
Description: This command sets the qualifier (<, >, =, ≠, ≤, ≥) to be used when triggering on a CAN bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to IDANDDATA or DATa (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:DATa:SIZe
Description: This command sets the length of the data string, in bytes, to be used when triggering on a CAN bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to IDANDDATA or DATa (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:DATa:VALue
Description: This command sets the binary data value to be used when triggering on a CAN bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to IDANDDATA or DATa (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Errtype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:ERRType
Description: This command sets or queries the type of error condition for a CAN bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to ERRor.
Category: Trigger

title: Brsbit
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:FD:BRSBit
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the bit rate switch bit (BRS bit) for a CAN bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by
x. The trigger condition must be set to FDBITS, and the CAN standard must be FDISO or FDNONISO.
Category: Trigger

title: Esibit
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:FD:ESIBit
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the error state indicator bit (ESI bit) for a CAN bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to FDBITS, and the CAN standard must be FDISO or FDNONISO.
Category: Trigger

title: Frametype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:FRAMEtype
Description: This command sets the frame type (data, remote, error or overload) to be used when triggering on a CAN bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to FRAMEtype (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:CONDition). B<x> is the bus number.The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Mode
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:IDentifier:MODe
Description: This command sets the addressing mode (standard or extended format) to be used when triggering on a CAN bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to IDANDDATA or DATa (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:IDentifier:VALue
Description: This command sets the binary address value to be used when triggering on a CAN bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to IDANDDATA or DATa (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:CAN:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:CONDition
Description: This command specifies a field or condition within an Ethernet frame to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:DATa:HIVALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to DATa, and the qualifier is set to either INrange or OUTrange, this command specifies the upper data value of the range. (Use the command TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:DATa:VALue to specify the lower limit of the range.) The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Offset
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:DATa:OFFSet
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to DATa, this command specifies where in the data field to look for the data trigger value. It specifies the offset into the data field, in bytes, where the value will be matched. The default is -1 (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:DATa:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to be used when triggering on an Ethernet bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to DATa. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:DATa:SIZe
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to DATa, this command specifies the number of contiguous TCP/IPv4/MAC client data bytes to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:DATa:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to DATa, and the qualifier is set to LESSthan, MOREthan, EQual, UNEQual, LESSEQual or MOREEQual, this command specifies the value to trigger on. When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to DATa, and the qualifier is set to INrange or OUTrange, this command specifies the lower limit of the range. (Use the command TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:DATa:HIVALue to set the upper limit of the range.) The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:IPHeader:DESTinationaddr:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to IPHeader, this command specifies the value of the 32–bit destination address that is to be used in the trigger (along with the source address and protocol value). The IP destination address is a standard IP address such as 192.168.0.1. The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:IPHeader:PROTOcol:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to IPHeader, this command specifies the value of the 8–bit protocol field that is to be used in the trigger (along with the source and destination addresses). The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:IPHeader:SOUrceaddr:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to IPHeader, this command specifies the value of the 32-bit source address that is to be used in the trigger (along with the destination address and protocol value). The IP source address is a standard IP address such as 192.168.0.1. The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:MAC:ADDRess:DESTination:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to MACADDress, this command specifies the 48–bit MAC destination address that is to be used in the trigger (along with the source address value). The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:MAC:ADDRess:SOUrce:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to MACADDress, this command specifies the 48–bit MAC source address value that is to be used in the trigger (along with the destination address value). The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:MAC:LENgth:HIVALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to MACLENgth, and the qualifier is set to INrange or OUTrange, this command specifies the upper data value of the range. (Use the command TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:MAC:LENgth:VALue to specify the lower limit of the range.) The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:MAC:LENgth:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to MACLENgth, and the qualifier is set to LESSthan, MOREthan, EQual, UNEQual, LESSEQual or MOREEQual, this command specifies the 16–bit value to trigger on. When the qualifier is set to INrange or OUTrange, this command specifies the lower limit of the range. (Use the command TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:MAC:LENgth:HIVALue to set the upper limit of the range.) The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:QTAG:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to QTAG, this command specifies the 32-bit Q-Tag value to trigger on. The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:TCPHeader:ACKnum:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to TCPHeader, this command specifies the 32-bit acknowledgement number that is to be used in the trigger (along with the destination and source port addresses and the sequence number). The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:TCPHeader:SEQnum:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to TCPHeader, this command specifies the 32–bit sequence number that is to be used in the trigger (along with the destination and source port addresses and the acknowledgement value). The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:ETHERnet:TCPHeader:SOUrceport:VALue
Description: When the Ethernet trigger condition is set to TCPHeader, this command specifies the 16–bit source port address that is to be used in the trigger (along with the destination port address, the sequence number and the acknowledgement number). The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition
Description: This command specifies the condition to use when triggering on a FlexRay bus signal (start of frame, frame type, ID, cycle count, header, data, ID and data, EOF, error). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CYCLEcount:HIVALue
Description: This command specifies the high value when triggering on a FlexRay bus cycle count field. (Use TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CYCLEcount:VALue to set the low value.) The trigger condition must be set to CYCLEcount (using TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CYCLEcount:QUALifier
Description: This command specifies the qualifier (<, >, =, <=, >=, not =, in range, out of range) to use when triggering on the FlexRay bus cycle count field. The trigger condition must be set to CYCLEcount (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CYCLEcount:VALue
Description: This command specifies the low value when triggering on the FlexRay bus cycle count field. (Use TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CYCLEcount:HIVALue to set the upper value.) The trigger condition must be set to CYCLEcount (using TRIGger:
{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition).The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:DATa:HIVALue
Description: This command specifies the high value when triggering on the FlexRay bus data field. (Use TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:DATa:VALue to set the
lower value.) The trigger condition needs to be set to ID or IDANDDATA (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition).The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Offset
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:DATa:OFFSet
Description: This command specifies the offset of the data string, in bytes, when triggering on the FlexRay bus data field. The trigger condition needs to be set to ID or IDANDDATA (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:DATa:QUALifier
Description: This command specifies the qualifier (<, >, =, <=, >=, not =, in range, out of range) to use when triggering on the FlexRay bus data field.
The trigger condition needs to be set to ID or IDANDDATA (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:DATa:SIZe
Description: This command specifies the length of the data string, in bytes, when triggering on the FlexRay bus data field. The trigger condition needs to be set to ID or IDANDDATA (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:DATa:VALue
Description: This command specifies the low value when triggering on the FlexRay bus data field. (Use TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:DATa:HIVALue to set the upper value.) The trigger condition needs to be set to ID or IDANDDATA (using TRIGger:
{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Eoftype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:EOFTYPE
Description: This command specifies the end of file type (static, dynamic or any) when triggering on the FlexRay bus EOF field. The trigger condition needs to be set to EOF (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Errtype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:ERRTYPE
Description: This command specifies the error type when triggering on the FlexRay bus signal. The trigger condition needs to be set to ERROR (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:FRAMEID:HIVALue
Description: This command specifies the high value when triggering on the FlexRay bus frame ID field. (Use TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:FRAMEID:VALue to set the low value.) The trigger condition needs to be set to IDentifier (using TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:FRAMEID:QUALifier
Description: This command specifies the qualifier to use when triggering on the FlexRay bus frame ID field. The trigger condition needs to be set to IDentifier (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:FRAMEID:VALue
Description: This command specifies the low value when triggering on the FlexRay bus frame ID field. (Use TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:FRAMEID:HIVALue to set the high value.) The trigger condition needs to be set to IDentifier (using TRIGger:{A| B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Frametype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:FRAMEType
Description: This command specifies the frame type (normal, payload, null, sync or startup) when triggering on the FlexRay bus signal. The trigger condition needs to be set to FRAMEType (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Crc
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:HEADER:CRC
Description: This command specifies the CRC portion of the binary header string when triggering on the FlexRay bus signal. The trigger condition needs to be set to HEADer (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Cyclecount
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:HEADER:CYCLEcount
Description: This command specifies the cycle count portion of the binary header string when triggering on the FlexRay bus header. The trigger condition needs to be set to HEADer (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Frameid
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:HEADER:FRAMEID
Description: This command specifies the frame ID portion of the binary header string when triggering on the FlexRay bus header. The trigger condition needs to be set to
HEADer (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Indbits
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:HEADER:INDBits
Description: This command specifies the indicator bits portion of the binary header string when triggering on the FlexRay bus header. The trigger condition needs to be set to HEADer (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Paylength
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:HEADER:PAYLength
Description: This command specifies the payload length portion of the binary header string when triggering on the FlexRay bus header. The trigger condition needs to be set to HEADer (using TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:FLEXray:CONDition).The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Mode
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:ADDRess:MODe
Description: This command specifies the I2C address mode to 7 or 10-bit. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:ADDRess:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary address string used for the I2C trigger if the trigger condition is ADDRESS or ADDRANDDATA. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:CONDition
Description: This command specifies the trigger condition for an I2C trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Direction
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:DIRection
Description: This command specifies the I2C trigger type to be valid on a Read, Write, or Either condition. Read or write is indicated by the R/W bit in the I2C protocol. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:SIZe
Description: This command specifies the length of the data string in bytes to be used for an I2C trigger if the trigger condition is DATA or ADDRANDDATA. Applies to bus <x>, where the bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I2C:DATa:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary data string used for I2C triggering if the trigger condition is DATA or ADDRANDDATA. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Mode
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:ADDRess:MODe
Description: This command specifies the I3C address mode to either 7bit or 10bit when triggering on address field. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:ADDRess:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary address string used for the I3C trigger if the trigger condition is ADDRESS. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:CONDition
Description: This command sets or queries the trigger condition for a I3C bus to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Direction
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:DATa:DIRection
Description: This command specifies the I3C bus data direction when triggering on data field. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:DATa:SIZe
Description: This command specifies the length of the data string in bytes to be used for an I3C trigger if the trigger condition is DATA. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:DATa:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary data string used for I3C triggering if the trigger condition is DATA. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Errortype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:ERRORTYPe
Description: This command specifies the error type when triggering on I3C errors. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Broadcastpacket
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:SDR:BROADCASTPacket
Description: This command sets or queries the I3C trigger for SDR broadcast packets. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Directpacket
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:SDR:DIRECTPacket
Description: This command sets or queries the I3C trigger for SDR Direct Packets. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Direction
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:I3C:TBIT:DIREction
Description: This command specifies the I3C trigger for T-Bit error direction when triggering on error type field. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:LIN:CONDition
Description: This command specifies the trigger condition for LIN. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:LIN:DATa:HIVALue
Description: This command specifies the high data value string used for a LIN bus trigger when the trigger condition is DATA or IDANDDATA and the data qualifier is INRANGE or OUTRANGE. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:LIN:DATa:QUALifier
Description: This command specifies the LIN data qualifier. This only applies if the trigger condition is IDANDDATA or DATA. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:LIN:DATa:SIZe
Description: This command specifies the length of the data string in bytes to be used for LIN trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:LIN:DATa:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary data string to be used for LIN trigger condition if trigger condition is ID or IDANDDATA. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Errtype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:LIN:ERRTYPE
Description: This command specifies the error type be used for LIN trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:LIN:IDentifier:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary address string used for LIN bus trigger if the trigger condition is ID or IDANDDATA. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:COMMAND:ADDRess:HIVALue
Description: This command sets or queries the high value when triggering on command word addresses for a MIL-STD-1553 bus. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to COMMAND, and the address qualifier must be INrange or OUTrange.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:COMMAND:ADDRess:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to be used when triggering on command word addresses for a MIL-STD-1553 bus. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to COMMAND.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:COMMAND:ADDRess:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the low value when triggering on command word addresses for a MIL-STD-1553 bus. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to COMMAND
Category: Trigger

title: Count
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:COMMAND:COUNt
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the command word "word count" field for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to COMMAND.
Category: Trigger

title: Parity
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:COMMAND:PARity
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the command word parity bit for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to COMMAND.
Category: Trigger

title: Subaddress
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:COMMAND:SUBADdress
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the command word subaddress field for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to COMMAND.
Category: Trigger

title: Trbit
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:COMMAND:TRBit
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the command word Transmit / Receive bit for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to COMMAND.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:CONDition
Description: This command sets or queries the field or condition for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Errtype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:ERRTYPe
Description: This command sets or queries the type of error condition for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to ERRor.
Category: Trigger

title: Bcr
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:STATus:BIT:BCR
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the broadcast command received bit (BCR bit, bit 15) in a status word for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to STATus.
Category: Trigger

title: Busy
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:STATus:BIT:BUSY
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the busy bit (BUSY bit, bit 16) in a status word for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to STATus.
Category: Trigger

title: Dbca
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:STATus:BIT:DBCA
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the dynamic bus control acceptance bit (DBCA bit, bit 18) in a status word for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on.
The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to STATus.
Category: Trigger

title: Instr
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:STATus:BIT:INSTR
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the instrumentation bit (INSTR bit, bit 10) in a status word for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to STATus.
Category: Trigger

title: Me
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:STATus:BIT:ME
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the message error bit (ME bit, bit 9) in a status word for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to STATus.
Category: Trigger

title: Srq
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:STATus:BIT:SRQ
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the status word service request bit (SRQ bit, bit 11) in a status word for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to STATus.
Category: Trigger

title: Subsf
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:STATus:BIT:SUBSF
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the subsystem flag bit (SUBSF bit, bit 17) in a status word for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to STATus.
Category: Trigger

title: Tf
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:STATus:BIT:TF
Description: This command sets or queries the value of the terminal flag bit (TF bit, bit 19) in a status word for a MIL-STD-1553 bus to triggering on. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to STATus.
Category: Trigger

title: Lesslimit
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:TIMe:LESSLimit
Description: This command sets or queries the lower limit to be used when triggering on response time / inter message gap time for a MIL-STD-1553 bus. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to TIMe.
Category: Trigger

title: Morelimit
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:TIMe:MORELimit
Description: This command sets or queries the upper limit to be used when triggering on response time / inter message gap time for a MIL-STD-1553 bus. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to TIMe.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:MIL1553B:TIMe:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to be used when triggering on response time / inter message gap time for a MIL-STD-1553 bus. The bus number is specified by x. The trigger condition must be set to TIMe.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:PARallel:DATa:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary data string used for a Parallel Bus trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:RS232C:CONDition
Description: This command specifies the condition for an RS-232C trigger, where the bus number is specified by< >x.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:RS232C:DATa:SIZe
Description: This command sets or queries the length of the data string in bytes to be used for an RS-232C trigger when the trigger condition is Data. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:RS232C:DATa:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the data address string used for the RS-232 bus trigger when the trigger condition is set to Data. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:CONDition
Description: This command sets or queries the trigger condition for a SENT bus.
Category: Trigger

title: Errtype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:ERRType
Description: This command sets or queries the error type to be used when triggering on SENT data.
Category: Trigger

title: Crc
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:ERRType:CRC
Description: This command sets or queries the CRC error type to be used when triggering on SENT data.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:CHAN1A:HIVALue
Description: This command sets or queries the high binary fast channel 1 value to use when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:CHAN1A:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to be used when triggering on SENT fast packet bus data for device channel 1.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:CHAN1A:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary fast channel 1 value to be used when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:CHAN2B:HIVALue
Description: This command sets or queries the high binary fast channel 2 value to use when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:CHAN2B:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to be used when triggering on SENT fast packet bus data for device channel 2.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:CHAN2B:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary fast channel 2 value to be used when triggering on a SENT bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to FAST.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:COUNTer:HIVALue
Description: This command sets or queries the high binary fast message counter value to be used when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:COUNTer:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to be used when triggering on SENT fast packet bus data for the secure format counter.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:COUNTer:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary fast message counter value to be used when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:INVERTNIBble:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary fast message inverted nibble value to be used when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:FAST:STATus:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary status value to be used when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:PAUSE:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to be used when triggering on SENT pause pulses.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:SLOW:DATA:HIVALue
Description: This command sets or queries the high binary Slow channel data value to use when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:SLOW:DATA:QUALifier
Description: This command sets or queries the binary identifier value to use when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:SLOW:DATA:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary slow channel value to use when triggering on a SENT bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SENT:SLOW:IDentifier:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the qualifier to use when triggering on SENT slow packet bus data.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPI:CONDition
Description: This command specifies the trigger condition for a SPI trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPI:DATa:SIZe
Description: This command specifies the length of the data string to be used for a SPI trigger if the trigger condition is DATa. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPI:DATa:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary data string used for SPI triggering if the trigger condition is DATA. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPMI:CONDition
Description: This command sets or queries the trigger condition for the specified SPMI bus.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPMI:DATa:SIZe
Description: This command sets or queries the length of the data string, in bytes, to be used when triggering on an SPMI bus signal.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPMI:DATa:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary data string used for SPMI triggering if the trigger condition is MASTERREAd, MASTERWRIte, REGREAd, REGWRIte, EXTREGREAd, EXTREGWRIte, LONGEXTREGREAd, LONGEXTREGWRIte, or REG0WRIte.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPMI:MASTERADDRess:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary data string that identifies the master address used in SPMI triggering if the trigger condition is
MASTERREAd, MASTERWRIte, or DEVICEDESCMASTERREAd.
Category: Trigger

title: Noresponse
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPMI:NORESPonse
Description: This command sets or queries whether or not to trigger on No Response frames.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPMI:REGISTERADDRess:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary data string that identifies the register address used in SPMI triggering if the trigger
condition is MASTERREAd, MASTERWRIte, REGREAd, REGWRIte, EXTREGREAd, EXTREGWRIte, LONGEXTREGREAd, or LONGEXTREGWRIte.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SPMI:SLAVEADDRess:VALue
Description: This command sets or queries the binary data string that identifies the slave address used in SPMI triggering if the trigger condition
is RESet, SLEep, SHUTdown, WAKeup, AUTHenticate, REGREAd, REGWRIte, EXTREGREAd, EXTREGWRIte, LONGEXTREGREAd, LONGEXTREGWRIte, DEVICEDESCSLAVEREAd, or REG0WRIte.
Category: Trigger

title: Response
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SVID:COMMand:RESPonse
Description: This command sets or queries the command response for SVID bus. The bus number is specified by x.

title: Type
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SVID:COMMand:TYPe
Description: This command sets or queries the command type for SVID bus. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SVID:CONDition
Description: This command sets or queries the trigger condition for a SVID bus to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.

title: Type
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SVID:ERRor:TYPe
Description: This command sets or queries the error type for SVID bus. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Type
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SVID:PARity:TYPe
Description: This command sets or queries the parity type for SVID bus. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Type
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SVID:PAYLoad:TYPe
Description: This command sets or queries the payload type for SVID bus. The bus number is specified by x.

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SVID:PAYLoad:VALue
Description: This command sets the binary payload value for a SVID bus to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.

body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:SVID:SLAVe:ADDRess
Description: This command sets the binary address of the slave for a SVID bus to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:ADDRess:HIVALue
Description: This command specifies the binary address string for the upper limit for inside-of-range and outside-of-range qualifiers for the USB trigger. Use the command TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:ADDRess:VALue to set the lower limit. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:ADDRess:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary address string to be used for USB trigger. The trigger condition must be set to TOKEN. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Condition
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:CONDition
Description: This command specifies the trigger condition for the USB trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Hivalue
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:DATa:HIVALue
Description: This command specifies the binary data string for the upper limit for inside-of-range and outside-of-range qualifiers for the USB trigger when the trigger condition is DATA. Use the command TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:DATa:VALue to set the lower limit. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Offset
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:DATa:OFFSet
Description: This command specifies the data offset in bytes to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.

title: Qualifier
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:DATa:QUALifier
Description: This command sets the qualifier to be used when triggering on a USB bus signal. The trigger condition must be set to DATAPACKET. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Size
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:DATa:SIZe
Description: This command specifies the number of contiguous data bytes to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Type
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:DATa:TYPe
Description: This command specifies the data type for a USB trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:DATa:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary data string to be used when triggering on a USB trigger.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:ENDPoint:VALue
Description: This command specifies the binary endpoint string to be used for the USB trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Errtype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:ERRType
Description: This command specifies the error type to be used when the trigger condition is set to ERRor. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Handshaketype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:HANDSHAKEType
Description: This command specifies the handshake type for the USB trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Sofframenumber

Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:SOFFRAMENUMber
Description: This command specifies the binary data string to be used for start of frame number, when the trigger condition is Token Packet and the token type is Start of Frame. The bus number is specified by x.

title: Specialtype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:SPECIALType
Description: This command specifies the packet ID (PID) for the special packet. The bus number is specified by x.

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:SPLit:ET:VALue
Description: When triggering on a high-speed USB split transaction, this command specifies the split transaction endpoint type value to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:SPLit:HUB:VALue
Description: When triggering on a high-speed USB split transaction, this command specifies the split transaction hub address value to trigger on. The trigger condition must be set to Special with packet type SPLIT. The value can be up to 7 characters long. The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:SPLit:PORT:VALue
Description: When triggering on a high-speed USB split transaction, this command specifies the split transaction port address value to trigger on. The trigger condition must be set to Special with a packet type SPLIT. The value can be up to 7 characters long. The default is all X’s (don’t care). The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:SPLit:SC:VALue
Description: When triggering on a high-speed USB split transaction, this command specifies whether to trigger on the start or complete phase of the split transaction, based on the Start/Complete bit field value. (0 = Start, 1 = Complete). The default is NOCARE. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Value
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:SPLit:SE:VALue
Description: When triggering on a high-speed USB split transaction, this command specifies the split transaction start/end bit value to trigger on. The bus number is specified by x.
For Interrupt and control transactions, the S bit means Speed: 0 = Full Speed, 1 = Low Speed. For bulk IN/OUT and isochronous IN start-split transactions, the S field must be 0.
For bulk/control IN/OUT, interrupt IN/OUT, and isochronous IN start-split transactions, the E field must be 0.
For full-speed isochronous OUT start-split transactions, the S (Start) and E (End) fields specify how the high-speed data payload  corresponds to data for a full-speed data packet as shown below:
S E High-speed to Full-speed Data Relation
0 0 High-speed data is the middle of the full-speed data payload.
0 1 High-speed data is the end of the full-speed data payload.
1 0 High-speed data is the beginning of the full-speed data payload. 1 1 High-speed data is all of the full speed data payload.
Category: Trigger

title: Tokentype
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:B<x>:USB:TOKENType
Description: This command specifies the token type for the USB trigger. The bus number is specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Source
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:BUS:SOUrce
Description: This command sets or queries the source bus for a bus trigger.
Category: Trigger

title: Coupling
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:COUPling
Description: This command sets or queries the type of coupling for the edge trigger. This command is equivalent to selecting Edge from the Trigger Type drop-down in the Trigger setup context menu, and choosing from the Coupling drop-down list.
Category: Trigger

title: Slope
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SLOpe
Description: This command sets or queries the slope for the edge trigger. This command is equivalent to selecting Edge from the Trigger Type drop-down in the Trigger setup context menu, and then choosing the desired Slope. This command is also equivalent to pressing the front-panel Slope button.
Category: Trigger

title: Source
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:EDGE:SOUrce
Description: This command sets or queries the source for the edge trigger. For instruments that have an Auxiliary Input, AUXiliary can be selected as trigger source.
Category: Trigger

title: Ch
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:LEVel:CH<x>
Description: This command sets or queries the CH<x> trigger level for an Edge, Pulse Width, Runt or Rise/Fall (Transition and Slew Rate) trigger when triggering on an analog channel waveform. Each channel can have an independent trigger level. The <x> is the channel number.
Category: Trigger

title: Deltatime
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:LOGIc:DELTatime
Description: This command specifies or queries the Logic trigger delta time value. The time value is used as part of the Logic trigger condition to determine if the duration of a logic pattern meets the specified time constraints.
Category: Trigger

title: Function
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:LOGIc:FUNCtion
Description: This command sets or queries the logical combination of the input channels for logic triggers. This command is equivalent to selecting Logic for the Trigger Type, and setting or viewing the Define Logic.
Category: Trigger

title: Source
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:LOGIc:INPut:CLOCk:SOUrce
Description: This command specifies the channel to use as the clock source for logic trigger.
Category: Trigger

title: {ch|ch_d}
Polarity
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:LOGIc:POLarity
Description: This command sets or queries the polarity for the clock channel when Use Clock Edge is set to Yes for Logic trigger type.
Category: Trigger

title: Useclockedge
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:LOGIc:USECLockedge
Description: This command specifies whether or not Logic trigger type uses clock source.
Category: Trigger

title: When
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:LOGIc:WHEn
Description: This command sets or queries the condition for generating an A or B logic trigger with respect to the defined input pattern. This command is equivalent to selecting Logic for Trigger Type, Use Clock Edge to No, and choosing a trigger condition from the Logic Pattern drop-down list.
Category: Trigger

title: Ch
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:LOWerthreshold:CH<x>
Description: This command sets or queries the A or B lower trigger level threshold for the channel, specified by x.
Category: Trigger

title: Highlimit
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:HIGHLimit
Description: This command specifies the upper limit to use, in seconds, when triggering on detection of a pulse whose duration is inside or outside a range of two values. (Use TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:LOWLimit to specify the lower value of the range.)
Category: Trigger

title: Logicqualification
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:LOGICQUALification
Description: This command specifies whether or not to use logic qualification for a pulse width trigger.
Category: Trigger

title: Lowlimit
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:LOWLimit
Description: This command specifies the lower limit to use, in seconds, when triggering on detection of a pulse whose duration is inside or outside a range of two values. (Use TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:HIGHLimit to specify the upper limit of the range.)
This command also specifies the single limit to use, in seconds, when triggering on detection of a pulse whose duration is less than, greater than, equal to, or not equal to this time limit.
Category: Trigger

title: Polarity
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:POLarity
Description: This command specifies the polarity for a pulse width trigger.
Category: Trigger

title: Source
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:SOUrce

Category: Trigger

title: When
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:WHEn
Description: This command specifies to trigger when a pulse is detected with a width (duration) that is less than, greater than, equal to, or unequal
to a specified value (set using TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:LOWLimit), OR whose width falls outside of or within a specified range of two values (set using TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth: LOWLimit and TRIGger:{A|B}:PULSEWidth:HIGHLimit).
Category: Trigger

title: Logicqualification
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:RUNT:LOGICQUALification

Category: Trigger

title: Polarity
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:RUNT:POLarity
Description: This command specifies the polarity for the runt trigger.
Category: Trigger

title: Source
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:RUNT:SOUrce
Description: This command specifies the source waveform for the runt trigger.

title: When
body:

title: Width
body:

title: Edge
body:

title: Source

title: Holdtime
body:

Category: Trigger

title: {ch|ch_d}
Settime

title: Logicqualification
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:TIMEOut:LOGICQUALification
Description: This command specifies whether or not to use logic qualification for a timeout trigger.
Category: Trigger

title: Polarity
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:TIMEOut:POLarity

Category: Trigger

title: Source
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:TIMEOut:SOUrce
Description: When triggering using the TIMEOut trigger type, this command specifies the source. The available sources are live channels and digital channels. The default is channel 1. The timeout trigger type is selected using TRIGger:{A|B}:TYPe TIMEOut.

title: Time
body:

Description: When triggering using the TIMEOut trigger type, this command specifies the timeout time, in seconds. This command is equivalent to selecting Timeout from the Trig menu and setting a value for Time Limit. The timeout trigger type is selected using TRIGger:{A|B}:TYPe TIMEOut
Category: Trigger

title: Deltatime
body:

title: Logicqualification
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:TRANsition:LOGICQUALification
Description: This command specifies whether or not to use logic qualification for a transition trigger.

title: Polarity
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:TRANsition:POLarity

title: Source

title: When
body:

title: Type

title: Logicqualification
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:WINdow:LOGICQUALification
Description: This command specifies whether or not to use logic qualification for a window trigger.

title: Source
body:
Command: TRIGger:{A|B}:WINdow:SOUrce
Description: This command sets or queries the source for a window trigger.

title: When

title: Width
body:

title: By
body:
Command: TRIGger:A:HOLDoff:BY
Description: This command sets or queries the type of holdoff for the A trigger. Holdoff types are expressed as either user-specified time (TIMe) or by an internally calculated random time value (RANDom). This command is equivalent to selecting Mode & Holdoff from the Trig menu and then setting the Holdoff type.
Category: Trigger

title: Time
body:
Command: TRIGger:A:HOLDoff:TIMe
Description: This command sets or queries the A trigger holdoff time. This command is equivalent to selecting Mode & Holdoff from the Trig menu, selecting Time, and then setting the desired Holdoff Time.
Category: Trigger

title: Logicqualification
body:
Command: TRIGger:A:LOGICQUALification
Description: This command sets or queries the type of logic qualification to perform.
Category: Trigger

title: Mode
body:

Description: This command sets or queries the A trigger mode. This command is equivalent to pushing the Mode button on the front panel.

title: Auxlevel
body:
Command: TRIGger:AUXLevel
Description: For those instruments that have an Auxiliary Input (such as an MSO58LP), this command sets or queries the Auxiliary Input voltage level to use for an edge trigger.
Category: Trigger

title: By
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:BY
Description: This command selects or returns whether the B trigger occurs after a specified number of events or a specified period of time after the A trigger.

title: Count
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:EVENTS:COUNt
Description: This command sets or queries the number of events that must occur before the B trigger. The B trigger event count applies only if TRIGger:B:BY is set to EVENTS.
Category: Trigger

title: Reset
body:

Description: This command sets the B reset trigger level to 50%.
Category: Trigger

title: Coupling
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:COUPling
Description: Sets or queries the trigger coupling for a sequential edge trigger reset when the Source is set to an analog channel.
Category: Trigger

title: Level
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:LEVel
Description: This command sets the voltage level to use for an Edge Reset trigger when triggering on an analog channel waveform.
Category: Trigger

title: Slope
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:SLOpe
Description: This command sets or queries the trigger slope for a sequential edge trigger reset.
Category: Trigger

title: Source
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:RESET:EDGE:SOUrce
Description: This command sets or queries the trigger source for the A→B sequential edge trigger reset feature.
Category: Trigger

title: Time
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:RESET:TIMEOut:TIMe
Description: This command sets or queries the reset timer for a sequential timeout trigger reset.
Category: Trigger

title: Type
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:RESET:TYPe
Description: This command sets or queries the type of A→B sequential trigger reset. If the B trigger reset is active, the reset criteria are part of
the B triggering sequence. If the reset conditions defined by the reset type are met, the instrument must start over searching for a new occurrence of the A event. You must identify a trigger Source and Threshold for each reset type, except for the Timeout trigger type. If a reset condition occurs, the reset criteria itself is reset and must start over.
Category: Trigger

title: State
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:STATE
Description: This command sets or queries the state of B trigger activity. If the B trigger state is on, the B trigger is part of the triggering sequence. If the B trigger state is off, then only the A trigger causes the trigger event.
Category: Trigger

title: Time
body:
Command: TRIGger:B:TIMe
Description: This command sets or queries B trigger delay time, in seconds. The B Trigger time applies only if TRIGger:B:BY is set to TIMe.
Category: Trigger

title: State
body:
Command: TRIGger:HYSTeresis:USER:STATe
Description: This command enables or disables user-defined trigger hysteresis.

title: Value

Description: This command sets or returns the height of the user-defined trigger hysteresis zone in volts.
Category: Trigger

title: State
body:

Description: This query-only command returns the current state of the triggering system.

title: Status
body:
Command: TRIGger:STATUs?
Description: This query-only command returns the current status of the triggering system.
Category: Trigger

title: Addnew
body:
Command: TSTamptable:ADDNew
Description: This command adds a new History time stamp results table to the scope application.

title: Delete

title: List

title: Aspectratio

title: Horizontal

title: Hittype

title: Reset

title: Source

Description: Sets or queries the signal source for the specified Visual Trigger area. The source can only be an analog channel.

title: Vertices

Description: Sets or queries the X and Y vertex coordinate values for all vertices of the specified Visual Trigger area. Vertex values must be set in pairs.

title: Width

Description: Sets or queries the width of the specified Visual Trigger area.
Category: Trigger

title: Xposition
body:
Command: VISual:AREA<x>:XPOSition
Description: Sets or queries the horizontal (X-axis) center position of the specified Visual Trigger area.
Category: Trigger

title: Yposition
body:
Command: VISual:AREA<x>:YPOSition
Description: Sets or queries the vertical (Y-axis) center position of the specified Visual Trigger area.

title: Deleteall

title: Enable

Description: Sets or queries the status (on or off) of the Visual Trigger mode.

title: Equation
body:
Command: VISual:EQUation
Description: Sets or queries the Visual Trigger area combination logic equation.

title: Showareas

Description: Shows or hides all Visual Trigger areas.

title: Showcriteria

Description: Sets or queries display of the area names and hit criteria for all visual trigger areas.
