title: LENGth (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:ANALysis:LENGth
Description: Sets or queries the analysis length in seconds or symbols. The command [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:TIMe:UNITs
determines which is used. For example, if the symbol rate is 1 MHz and the acquisition length is 20 ms, the range may be 0 to 19999.
Setting a specified length changes [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:ANALysis:AUTO to OFF.
2058
Category: SENSe

title: ACTual (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:ANALysis:LENGth:ACTual
Description: Queries the actual analysis length which returns a value in either seconds or symbols. The command
[SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:TIMe:UNITs determines which is used.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:ANALysis:LENGth:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to set the analysis length of the measurement source automatically or manually.
Category: SENSe

title: MODE (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:MODE
Description: Sets or queries the measurement bandwidth mode of the measurement source for Digital Demod measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: TINTerval (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:TINTerval
Description: Sets or queries the measurement bandwidth of the measurement source (frequency span).
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:TINTerval:AUTO
Description: Sets or queries the measurement bandwidth of the measurement source (frequency span) automatically.
Category: SENSe

title: DETect (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:BURSt:DETect
Description: Sets or queries burst detection of the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: THReshold (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:BURSt:THReshold
Description: Sets or queries the threshold level of the measurement source above which the input signal is determined to be a burst.
Category: SENSe

title: OFFSet (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:CARRier:OFFSet
Description: Sets or queries the carrier frequency offset for the measurement source in digital modulation analysis.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:CARRier:OFFSet:AUTO
Description: Sets or queries whether to detect the carrier frequency automatically for the measurement source in digital modulational analysis.
Category: SENSe

title: AVAilable (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:EQUalizer:AVAilable
Description: Determines if the equalizer is available for the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: CONVergence (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:EQUalizer:CONVergence
Description: Sets or queries the Convergence value (also known as tap update rate) of the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: ENABle (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:EQUalizer:ENABle
Description: Sets or queries the Equalizer state of the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: LENGth (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:EQUalizer:LENGth
Description: Sets or queries the equalizer filter length of measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: MODE (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:EQUalizer:MODE
Description: Sets or queries the equalizer mode of the measurement source. The equalizer can in learning mode (train) or enabled (hold).
Category: SENSe

title: RESet (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:EQUalizer:RESet
Description: Resets the equalizer settings of the measurement source to default values.
2068
Category: SENSe

title: TAPS (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:EQUalizer:TAPS
Description: Sets or queries the number of filter coefficients for the equalizer of the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: TSRAtio (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:EQUalizer:TSRAtio
Description: Sets or queries the Equalizer taps or Symbol parameter for the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: ALPHa (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:FILTer:ALPHa
Description: Sets or queries the filter factor (α/BT) for the measurement source in the digital modulation analysis.
Category: SENSe

title: MEASurement (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:FILTer:MEASurement
Description: Sets or queries the measurement filter for the measurement source in the digital modulation analysis.
2070
Category: SENSe

title: REFerence (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:FILTer:REFerence
Description: Sets or queries the reference filter
Category: SENSe

title: DEViation (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:FREQuency:DEViation
Description: Sets or queries the frequency deviation of the measurement source in the digital modulation analysis. Programming a specified frequency
deviation sets [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:FREQuency:DEViation:AUTO OFF.
2072
This command is valid when [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MODulation:TYPE is set to C4FM, FSK2, FSK4, FSK8, or
FSK16.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:FREQuency:DEViation:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to detect automatically or set manually the frequency deviation of the measurement source used to determine the
symbol values of an FSK or C4FM signal.
This command is valid when [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MODulation:TYPE is set to C4FM, FSK2, FSK4, FSK8, or
FSK16.
Category: SENSe

title: NORMalize (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MAGNitude:NORMalize
Description: Sets or queries the method for the magnitude normalization of the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: MINDex (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MINDex
Description: Sets or queries the measurement source modulation index of a CPM signal.
This command is valid when [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MODulation:TYPE is set to CPM and
[SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MINDex:AUTO is set to OFF.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MINDex:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to detect automatically or set manually the measurement source modulation index of a CPM signal. This command is
valid when [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MODulation:TYPE is set to CPM.
Category: SENSe

title: TYPE (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MODulation:TYPE
Description: Sets or queries the modulation type for the measurement source in the digital modulation analysis.
Category: SENSe

title: PRESet (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:PRESet
Description: Presets the modulation analysis analysis of the measurement source to a communication standard.
Category: SENSe

title: RADius (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:RING:RADius
Description: Sets or queries the ring radius of the measurement source in the digital APSK modulation analysis.
Category: SENSe

title: ROTation (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:RING:ROTation
Description: Sets or queries the ring rotation of the measurement source in the digital APSK modulation analysis.
Category: SENSe

title: SRATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SRATe
Description: Sets or queries the symbol rate for the measurement source in the digital modulation analysis.
Category: SENSe

title: IQ (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SWAP:IQ
Description: Determines whether or not to exchange I and Q data of the measurement source before demodulating.
Category: SENSe

title: HSSHift (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SYMBol:HSSHift
Description: Sets or queries the measurement source Q data half-symbol shift for OQPSK and SOQPSK signals.
Category: SENSe

title: SOURce (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SYMBol:MAP:SOURce
Description: Queries the user symbol map of the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SYMBol:MAP[:STATe]
Description: Determines whether or not to use the user symbol map of the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: POSition (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SYMBol:PLOT:POSition
Description: Sets or queries the symbol point location for measurement source on an SOQPSK waveform.
Category: SENSe

title: POINts (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SYMBol:POINts
Description: Sets or queries the number of points per symbol of the measurement source (how many points to use between symbols when connecting
the dots).
Note: 1 is not valid for the GMSK modulation.
In the constellation view, select VECTors using the TRACe<x>:CONSte:MODE command first to change Points/Symbol.
Category: SENSe

title: SEARch (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SYMBol:RATE:SEARch
Description: Determines whether to enable a symbol rate search of the measurement source. This command is valid when the demodulation type is set
to FSK2, FSK4, FSK8, or FSK16.
Category: SENSe

title: WORD (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SYNCh:WORD
Description: Determines whether to enable the synchronization word of the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: SYMBol (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SYNCh:WORD:SYMBol
Description: Sets or queries the synchronization word of the measurement source when [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:SYNCh:WORD
is ON. The word depends on the modulation type selected by the [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:MODulation:TYPE
command.
Category: SENSe

title: UNITs (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DDEMod[:SOURce<x>]:TIMe:UNITs
Description: Sets or queries the fundamental unit of time of the measurement source.
Category: SENSe

title: SOURce (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DIQVtime[:MEASview<y>]:SELEcted:SOURce
Description: Sets or queries the Source of Demod I&Q versus Time for a selected Measurement view number.
The parameter <y> = 1 to number of instances of a measurement created or number of channels available in an instrument (Example: 1 to
8 channels for MSO58).
Category: SENSe

title: GAIN (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:AUDio:DEMod:GAIN
Description: Sets or queries the audio gain.
Note: The sound level is also affected by the Windows volume control.
Category: SENSe

title: RXBWidth (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:AUDio:DEMod:RXBWidth
Description: Sets or queries the receiver bandwidth for the audio demodulation
Category: SENSe

title: RXFRequency (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:AUDio:DEMod:RXFRequency
Description: Returns the receiver frequency in the audio demodulation. The frequency depends on the setting of the
[SENSe]:DPX:AUDio:DEMod:TUNE command.
Category: SENSe

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:AUDio:DEMod:STATe
Description: Sets or queries whether to enable or disable the audio demodulation
Category: SENSe

title: TUNE (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:AUDio:DEMod:TUNE
Description: Sets or queries how to determine the tuning frequency in the audio demodulation.
Category: SENSe

title: TYPE (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:AUDio:DEMod:TYPE
Description: Sets or queries the modulation type for the audio demodulation
Category: SENSe

title: ACTual (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:ACTual
Description: Queries the actual bandwidth whether set automatically or manually.
Category: SENSe

title: RESolution (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:RESolution
Description: Sets or queries the resolution bandwidth (RBW) in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}[:RESolution]:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to set the resolution bandwidth (RBW) automatically or manually in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: RATio (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:SPAN:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}[:RESolution]:RATio
Description: Determines whether to set the resolution bandwidth (RBW) automatically or manually in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: RESults (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:CLEar:RESults
Description: Restarts multi-trace functions (Average and Max/Min Hold).
Category: SENSe

title: COLor (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:COLor
Description: Sets or queries the color palette of three-dimensional graphs.
Category: SENSe

title: MAXimum (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:COLor:MAXimum
Description: Sets or queries the maximum value of the color axis in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: MINimum (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:COLor:MINimum
Description: Sets or queries the minimum value of the color axis in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: SHOW (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DDENsity:MEASurement:SHOW
Description: Sets the Show measurement value (measurement always visible for DPX Trigger) or queries for the current value.
Category: SENSe

title: MAXimum (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:COLor:MAXimum
Description: Sets or queries the maximum value of the color axis in the DPXogram measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: MINimum (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:COLor:MINimum
Description: Sets or queries the minimum value of the color axis in the DPXogram measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: COUNt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:POINts:COUNt
Description: Sets or queries the number of trace points acquired for the DPXogram display.
Category: SENSe

title: CAPacity (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:TIME:CAPacity
Description: Returns the time capacity of the DPXogram measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: RESolution (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:TIME:RESolution
Description: Sets or queries the time resolution of the DPXogram measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:TIME:RESolution:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to set the time resolution automatically or manually in the DPXogram measurement.
When Auto is enabled, the time resolution value is based on the Time/div setting. See the
DISPlay:DPX:DGRam:TIME[:SCALe]:PDIVision command.
Category: SENSe

title: DIRection (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:WATerfall:DIRection
Description: Sets or queries the direction of the Waterfall (DPXogram) display.
Category: SENSe

title: ENABle (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:WATerfall:ENABle
Description: Sets or queries the Waterfall (DPXogram) display.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:Y[:SCALe]:AUTO
Description: Rescales the height axis automatically to fit the waveform to the screen in the DPXogram display.
Category: SENSe

title: RESet (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DGRam:Y[:SCALe]:RESet
Description: Resets the height scale of the DPXogram display to the default values:
Height position = 0 dB and Height scale = 100 dB.
Category: SENSe

title: DWELl (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DWELl
Description: Sets or queries the value of the Dwell time for the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:DWELl:AUTO
Description: Sets the value of the Dwell time automatically or queries for the current value.
Category: SENSe

title: PLOT (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:PLOT
Description: Sets or queries the plot in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: COUNt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:POINts:COUNt
Description: Sets the number of trace points acquired for the DPX, Spectrum display.
Category: SENSe

title: CENTer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:CENTer
Description: Sets or queries the center frequency in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
Note: The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other with the following relationships: (start frequency) =
(center frequency) - (span)/2 and (stop frequency) = (center frequency) + (span)/2.
Category: SENSe

title: SPAN (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:SPAN
Description: Sets or queries the frequency span in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the measurement start frequency (left edge on the graph) in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other. Refer to the [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:CENTer
command.
Category: SENSe

title: STEP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:STEP
Description: Sets or queries the frequency step size (the amount per press by which the up or down key changes the setting value). Programming a
specified step size sets [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO OFF.
2104
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to set the frequency step size automatically or manually.
Category: SENSe

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:STOP
Description: Sets or queries the measurement stop frequency (right edge of the graph) in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other. Refer to the [SENSe]:DPX:FREQuency:CENTer
command.
Category: SENSe

title: BANDwidth|BWIDth (SENSe)
ACTual (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:ACTual
Description: Queries the actual bandwidth in the DPX measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: CENTer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:FREQuency:CENTer
Description: Sets or queries the center frequency in the DPX, Spectrum measurement.
2108
Note: The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other with the following relationships: (start frequency) =
(center frequency) - (span)/2 and (stop frequency) = (center frequency) + (span)/2.
Category: SENSe

title: RESults (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:FREQuency:TXBer:CLEar:RESults
Description: Clears the measurement results of the active Tx BER measurement. Sending this command does not halt the Tx BER measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: ENABle (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:FREQuency:TXBer:ENABle
Description: Sets or queries the Tx BER measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: PATTern (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:FREQuency:TXBer:PATTern
Description: Sets or queries the Tx BER data pattern.
Category: SENSe

title: INVert (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:FREQuency:TXBer:PATTern:INVert
Description: Sets or queries the data pattern Invert setting.
Category: SENSe

title: REPeat (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:FREQuency:TXBer:PATTern:REPeat
Description: Sets or queries the test duration for a User Pattern. A User Pattern test duration can be one time through or it can repeat.
Category: SENSe

title: REVerse (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:FREQuency:TXBer:PATTern:REVerse
Description: Sets or queries whether the data pattern is in normal order or reversed. This setting applies only to PRBS patterns.
Category: SENSe

title: SOURce (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:FREQuency:TXBer:PATTern:SOURce
Description: Returns the path and file name of the user-defined pattern file.
Category: SENSe

title: RBW (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:RBW
Description: Sets or queries the value of the RBW filter.
Category: SENSe

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:RBW:STATe
Description: Determines whether to set the resolution bandwidth (RBW) filter automatically or manually in the DPX measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: TIME (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:SWEep:TIME
Description: Sets or queries the sweep time when the plot is set to ZSPan, FREQuency, or PHASe.
Category: SENSe

title: TMOTion (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:DPX:TDM:TMOTion
Description: Sets or queries the trace motion when the plot is set to ZSPan, FREQuency, or PHASe.
Category: SENSe

title: BANDwidth|BWIDTH (SENSe)
ACTual (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:{BANDwidth|BWIDTH}:ACTual
Description: Queries the actual measurement bandwidth in the Settling Time measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: CENTer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:FREQuency:CENTer
Description: Queries the actual measurement bandwidth in the Settling Time measurements
Category: SENSe

title: OFFSet (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:FREQuency:OFFSet
Description: Sets or queries the offset frequency.
Category: SENSe

title: LENGth (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:LENGth
Description: Sets or queries the measurement length.
Category: SENSe

title: ACTual (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:LENGth:ACTual
Description: Queries the actual measurement length for the Settling Time measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: LIMit (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:MASK:LIMit
Description: Sets or queries the frequency or phase limit for the specified region.
2176
Category: SENSe

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:MASK:STATe
Description: Sets or queries mask test state.
Category: SENSe

title: REFerence (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:MASK:TIME:REFerence
Description: Sets or queries the mask time reference.
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:MASK:TIME:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the mask region start time in seconds.
Category: SENSe

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:MASK:TIME:STOP
Description: Sets or queries the mask region stop time in seconds.
Category: SENSe

title: MAXTracepoints (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:MAXTracepoints
Description: Sets or queries the maximum trace points in the Settling Time measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: MINimum (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:SDURation:MINimum
Description: Sets or queries the minimum settled duration in seconds. This duration time determines the result of :FETCh: {FSETtling |
Category: SENSe

title: REFerence (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:TARGet:REFerence
Description: Sets or queries the target reference frequency.
Category: SENSe

title: TOLerance (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:{FSETtling|PSETtling}:TOLerance
Description: Sets or queries the frequency or phase range into which the signal must settle.
Category: SENSe

title: RESults (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:CLEar:RESults
Description: Restarts multi-trace functions (Average and Max/Min Hold).
Category: SENSe

title: CENTer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:CENTer
Description: Sets or queries the center frequency in the Frequency versus Time measurement.
Note: The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other with the following relationships: (start frequency) =
(center frequency) - (span)/2 and (stop frequency) = (center frequency) + (span)/2.
Category: SENSe

title: SPAN (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:SPAN
Description: Sets or queries the frequency span in the Frequency versus Time measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the measurement start frequency (left edge on the graph) in the Frequency versus Time measurement.
The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other. Refer to the
[SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:CENTer command.
Category: SENSe

title: STEP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STEP
Description: Sets or queries the frequency step size (the amount per press by which the up or down key changes the setting value). Programming a
specified step size sets [SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO OFF.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to set the frequency step size automatically or manually.
Category: SENSe

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STOP
Description: Sets or queries the measurement stop frequency (right edge of the graph) in the Frequency versus Time measurement.
The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other. Refer to the
[SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:CENTer command.
Category: SENSe

title: MAXTracepoints (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:FVTime[:MEASview<y>]:MAXTracepoints
Description: Sets or queries the maximum trace points in the Frequency versus Time measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: RESults (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:CLEar:RESults
Description: Restarts multi-trace functions (Average and Max/Min Hold).
Category: SENSe

title: CENTer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:CENTer
Description: Sets or queries the center frequency in the RF I&Q versus Time measurement.
Note: The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other with the following relationships: (start frequency) =
(center frequency) - (span)/2 and (stop frequency) = (center frequency) + (span)/2.
Category: SENSe

title: SPAN (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:SPAN
Description: Sets or queries the frequency span in the RF I&Q versus Time measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the measurement start frequency (left edge on the graph) in the RF I&Q versus Time measurement.
The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other. Refer to the
[SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:CENTer command.
Category: SENSe

title: STEP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STEP
Description: Sets or queries the frequency step size (the amount per press by which the up or down key changes the setting value). Programming a
specified step size sets [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO OFF.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to set the frequency step size automatically or manually.
Category: SENSe

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STOP
Description: Sets or queries the measurement stop frequency (right edge of the graph) in the RF I&Q versus Time measurement.
The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other. Refer to the
[SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:CENTer command.
Category: SENSe

title: MAXTracepoints (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:MAXTracepoints
Description: Sets or queries the maximum trace points in the RF I&Q versus Time measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: SOURce (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:IQVTime[:MEASview<y>]:SELEcted:SOURce
Description: Sets or queries the Source with respect to the RF I&Q versus Time Measurement View nuumber
Category: SENSe

title: AVERage (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:AVERage
Description: Sets or queries the average method in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: COUNt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:AVERage:COUNt
Description: Sets or queries the average count in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: RESolution (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}[:RESolution]
Description: Sets or queries the resolution bandwidth (RBW). Programming a specified RBW sets [SENSe]:MCPower{BANDwidth|
BWIDth}[:RESolution]:AUTO OFF.
Category: SENSe

title: ACTual (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}[:RESolution]:ACTual
Description: Queries the actual resolution bandwidth (RBW) in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}[:RESolution]:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to set the resolution bandwidth (RBW) automatically or manually.
Category: SENSe

title: VIDeo (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:VIDeo
Description: Sets or queries the video bandwidth (VBW). Programming a specified VBW sets [SENSe]:MCPower:{BANDwidth|
BWIDth}:VIDeo:STATe OFF.
Category: SENSe

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:VIDeo:STATe
Description: Determines whether to enable the video bandwidth (VBW) in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

body:

Description: Deletes a selected adjacent channel in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: ENABle (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:CHANnel:ADJacent:LIMIts<x>:ENABle
Description: Queries whether the adjacent channel is selected or not in the P25 MCPR display
Category: SENSe

title: LIMItsx (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:CHANnel:ADJacent:LIMIts<x>
Description: This command returns the selected adjacent upper and lower limit values. Selection of adjacent channel.
Category: SENSe

title: FILTer (SENSe)
body:

Description: Sets or queries the adjacent channel filter in the MCPR measurement.

title: BANDwidth|BWIDth (SENSe)
COUNt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:CHANnel:MAIN:COUNt
Description: Sets or queries the number of main channels in the MCPR measurement. You can use this command to add and remove main channels.
Category: SENSe

title: INACtive (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:CHANnel:MAIN:INACtive
Description: Makes a specified main channel inactive. You can set it on or off. The query returns all inactive main channels.
Category: SENSe

title: SPACing (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:CHANnel:MAIN:SPACing
Description: Sets or queries frequency difference between centers of each main channel in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: CHIPrate (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:CHIPrate
Description: Sets or queries the chip rate in the MCPR measurement. This command is valid when [SENSe]:MCPower:CHANnel:FILTer is
set to RRCosine (Root-Raised-Cosine).
Category: SENSe

title: RESults (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:CLEar:RESults
Description: Restarts the average trace.
Category: SENSe

title: FREQuency (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:FREQuency
Description: Sets or queries the center frequency in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: STEP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:FREQuency:STEP
Description: Sets or queries the frequency step size. Programming a specified step size sets [SENSe]:MCPower:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO
OFF.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to set the frequency step size automatically or manually in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:NFLoor:STATe
Description: Sets or queries whether to enable the correction for noise floor
Category: SENSe

title: COUNt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:POINts:COUNt
Description: Sets or queries the number of trace points in the MCPR display.
Category: SENSe

title: RCHannels (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:RCHannels
Description: Queries the power reference in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: MAINx (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:RCHannels:MAIN<x>
Description: Sets the power reference to the main channel with the index (<x>) in the MCPR measurement.
The parameter <x> = 1 to 99, representing the main channel 1 to 99, respectively. The main channel must be defined using the s
commands.
Category: SENSe

title: TOTal (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:RCHannels:TOTal
Description: Sets the power reference to the total power of all the active channels in the MCPR measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: RRCRolloff (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:MCPower:RRCRolloff
Description: Sets or queries the filter parameter (roll-off ratio) for the Root Raised Cosine filter.
Category: SENSe

title: AVERage (SENSe)
body:

title: COUNt (SENSe)
body:

BWIDth}[:RESolution]:AUTO OFF.

body:

body:

BWIDth}:VIDeo:STATe OFF.

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:OBWidth:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:VIDeo:STATe

Category: SENSe

title: RESults (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:OBWidth:CLEar:RESults
Description: Restarts the average trace. This command is valid when [SENSe]:OBWidth: AVERage is set to ON.
2264
Category: SENSe

title: CENTer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:OBWidth:FREQuency:CENTer
Description: Sets or queries the center frequency in the Occupied Bandwidth measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: STEP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:OBWidth:FREQuency:STEP
Description: Sets or queries the frequency step size in the Occupied Bandwidth measurement. Programming a specified step size sets
[SENSe]:OBWidth:FREQuency:STEP AUTO OFF.

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:OBWidth:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to set the frequency step size automatically or manually in the Occupied Bandwidth measurement.
Category: SENSe

2280

[SENSe]:PNOise:AVERage:ENABleis set to ON.

body:
Command: [SENSe]:PNOise:AVERage:ENABle
Description: Determines whether to enable averaging trace in the phase noise measurement.
Category: SENSe

Description: Sets or queries the threshold level to detect the carrier in the phase noise measurement.

body:

body:

body:

Category: SENSe

title: ALENgth (SENSe)
body:

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:IRESponse:MEASurement:TIME:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the start time for the Impulse Response measurements
Category: SENSe

title: LEVel (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:LEVel
Description: Sets or queries how to determine the 50% level
Category: SENSe

title: FIFTy (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:LEVel:FIFTy
Description: Sets or queries how to determine the 50% level for the pulsed RF measurements. This command is equivalent to the
[SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:LEVel command.
Category: SENSe

title: HUNDred (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:LEVel:HUNDred
Description: Sets or queries how to determine the 100% level in the pulsed RF measurements. This command is equivalent to the[SENSe]:
PULSe:ANALyze:LEVel command.
Category: SENSe

title: ALENgth (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:OVERshoot:MEASurement:TIME:ALENgth
Description: Sets or queries the absolute amount of time included in the Overshoot measurements
Category: SENSe

title: METHod (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:OVERshoot:MEASurement:TIME:METHod
Description: Sets or queries the measurement time method for the Overshoot measurements
Category: SENSe

title: RLENgth (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:OVERshoot:MEASurement:TIME:RLENgth
Description: Sets or queries the relative amount of time included in the Overshoot measurements
Category: SENSe

title: RLEVel (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:OVERshoot:MEASurement:TIME:RLEVel
Description: Sets or queries the measurement reference level for the Overshoot measurements
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:OVERshoot:MEASurement:TIME:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the start time for the Overshoot measurements
Category: SENSe

title: PMLocation (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:PMLocation
Description: Sets or queries the phase measurement location (the position along the pulse tops where the phase is measured) in the pulse-pulse phase
measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: LOCation (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:POINt:LOCation
Description: Sets or queries the point location method in the pulsed RF measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: RFALl (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:RFALl
Description: Sets or queries the threshold levels to measure the rise/fall time.
Category: SENSe

title: RIPPle (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:ANALyze:RIPPle
Description: Sets or queries the ripple portion of the pulse top (how much of the beginning and end of the pulse top to exclude from the ripple
calculation).
Category: SENSe

title: FREQuency (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:CARRier:FREQuency
Description: Queries the carrier frequency.
Category: SENSe

title: OFFSet (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:CARRier:OFFSet
Description: Sets or queries the carrier frequency offset.
Category: SENSe

title: SEARch (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:CARRier:SEARch
Description: Sets or queries how to detect the carrier in the pulsed RF measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: MEASurement (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:DETect:MEASurement
Description: Determines whether or not to set the maximum number of pulses to measure within the analysis time.
Category: SENSe

title: NUMBer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:DETect:NUMBer
Description: Sets or queries the maximum number of pulses to measure within the analysis time when
[SENSe]:PULSe:DETect:MEASurement is On.
Category: SENSe

title: THReshold (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:DETect:POWer[:THReshold]
Description: Sets or queries the power threshold to detect pulses
Category: SENSe

title: THReshold (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:DETect:TIMe[:THReshold]
Description: Sets or queries the minimum off-time between pulses.
Category: SENSe

title: BANDwidth|BWIDth (SENSe)
MEASurement (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:FILTer:MEASurement
Description: Sets or queries the measurement filter in the pulsed RF measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:FREFerence:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to estimate the pulse frequency reference automatically or manually in the pulsed RF measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: CSLope (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:FREFerence:CSLope
Description: Sets or queries the Chirp Slope.
Chirp Slope is used when the Modulation Type is set to Linear Chirp. When set, this also changes the Chirp Slope to manual mode. When
chirp slope is in auto mode, the query returns the estimated chirp slope.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:FREFerence:CSLope:AUTO
Description: Sets or queries enabling automatic Chirp Slope estimating in the pulsed RF measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: OFFSet (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:FREFerence:OFFSet
Description: Sets or queries the frequency reference offset. This command is valid when
[SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:FREFerence:AUTO is set to OFF.
Category: SENSe

title: TYPE (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:MODulation:TYPE
Description: Sets or queries the modulation type in the pulsed RF measurements. This command is equivalent to the
[SENSe]:REANalyze:NEXT command.
Category: SENSe

title: TYPE (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:SIGNal:TYPE
Description: Sets or queries the signal type in the pulsed RF measurements.
Category: SENSe

title: ORDinate (SENSe)
body:

Description: Sets or queries the Histogram Y unit. This command is valid when DISPlay:PULSe:STATistics:PLOT is set to Histogram.
Category: SENSe

title: POINts (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:STATistics:HISTogram:POINts
Description: Sets or queries the number of bins in the Histogram plot.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:PULSe[:MEASview<y>]:STATistics:HISTogram:POINts:AUTO
Description: Sets or queries enabling automatic Histogram plot bins count.
Category: SENSe

title: REANalyze (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze
Description: Sets all measurements to reanalyze the last acquisition.
Note: hg is an overlapped command, which does not finish executing before the next command starts executing. Use the
*OPC(?) and *WAI commands to synchronize all pending operations to the execution of this command.
2370
Category: SENSe

title: SETTings (SENSe)

Description: Queries the settings of all acquisitions in acquisition history

title: LOOP (SENSe)

title: CURRent (SENSe)

Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:CURRent:TIMestamp
Description: Queries the time stamp of the currently selected acquisition (or frame)

title: DATA (SENSe)
body:

Category: SENSe

title: FIRSt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:FIRSt

Category: SENSe

title: LAST (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:LAST

title: TYPE (SENSe)
body:

body:

Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:ACQuisition:LAST

FastFrame is enabled.

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:ACQuisition:STOP
Description: Sets or queries the Acquisition Stop value in the acquisition history selection

title: TIMestamp (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:ACQuisition:STOP:TIMestamp
Description: Queries the time stamp of the current Acquisition Stop selection. This is the time stamp of the last frame of the selected acquisition, if
FastFrame is enabled.

title: ALL (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:ALL
Description: Selects all acquisitions and frames in the current acquisition history
Category: SENSe

body:

Description: Queries the first available Frame Start or Stop value available for acquisition history selection

Category: SENSe

title: LAST (SENSe)
body:

Description: Queries the last available Frame Start or Stop value available for acquisition history selection

title: TIMestamp (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:FRAMe:LAST:TIMestamp
Description: Queries the time stamp associated with the last available frame of the last available Acquisition Start or Stop value
Category: SENSe

Description: Sets or queries the Frame Start value in the acquisition history selection

body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:FRAMe:STARt:TIMestamp
Description: Queries the time stamp of the current Frame Start selection. This is the time stamp of the Frame Start frame of the acquisition start
acquisition, if FastFrame is enabled.

body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:FRAMe:STOP

Category: SENSe

title: TIMestamp (SENSe)
body:

Description: Queries the time stamp of the current frame stop selection. It is the time stamp of the frame Stop frame of the Acquisition Stop acquisition,
if FastFrame is enabled.

title: ALL (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:ALL
Description: Selects all spectra acquisitions and frames in the currently selected set

title: ACQuisition (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:CURRent:ACQuisition

title: TIMestamp (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:CURRent:TIMestamp
Description: Queries the time stamp of the currently selected acquisition.

title: FIRSt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:FIRSt
Description: Queries the first selectable acquisition start or stop value in the currently selected set.
Category: SENSe

title: TIMestamp (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:FIRSt:TIMestamp
Description: Queries the time stamp of the first selectable acquisition history start or stop value in the currently selected acquisition set.
Category: SENSe

title: LAST (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:LAST
Description: Queries the last selectable acquisition start or stop value in the currently selected set.

title: TIMestamp (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:LAST:TIMestamp
Description: Queries the time stamp of the last selectable acquisition start or stop value in the currently selected set.
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the acquisition start value in the currently selected set.

title: TIMestamp (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:STARt:TIMestamp
Description: Queries the time stamp of the current acquisition start selection.

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:STOP
Description: Sets or queries the acquisition stop value in the currently selected set.

title: TIMestamp (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SELect:SPECtra:ACQuisition:STOP:TIMestamp
Description: Queries the time stamp of the current acquisition stop selection.
Category: SENSe

title: SPEed (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:SPEed
Description: Sets or queries the time delay value inserted between reanalysis of frames or acquisitions.
Category: SENSe

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:STOP
Description: Stops the current reanalysis. The command will block until the current reanalysis has completed and stopped.
Category: SENSe

title: DECimal (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:REANalyze:TIMestamp:DECimal
Description: Sets or queries the number of values to the right of the decimal point to include in all time stamps
Category: SENSe

title: TIMe (SENSe)
body:
Command: SENSe:ROSCillator:EXTernal:TIMe
Description: Sets or queries the timing reference.
For the RSA7100A (Option GPS required): The default timing reference source upon launch of SignalVu-PC is system time. If you
change the timing reference source from the default to one of the externally generated sources (GPS, PPS, IRIG-B) without a valid signal,
the time will remain system time.
If you set the source to GPS, PPS, or IRIG-B after launch of SignalVu-PC (thus changing the time from the default system time), and
then disconnect from that source or otherwise lose the lock to that source, the time used will be that of the previous externally generated
source. This will remain so until you set a different source with a valid signal.
Category: SENSe

title: STATus (SENSe)
body:
Command: SENSe:ROSCillator:EXTernal:TIMe:STATus
Description: Queries if the timing reference source is locked or unlocked.
Category: SENSe

title: RESolution (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}[:RESolution]
Description: Sets or queries the resolution bandwidth (RBW) of the reference channel.
Note: In Real-time operation this sets the RBW for the reference and all offset channels.
Category: SENSe

title: VIDeo (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:VIDeo
Description: Sets or queries the video bandwidth (VBW) of the reference channel.
Note: In Real-time operation this sets the RBW for the reference and all offset channels.
Category: SENSe

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:VIDeo:STATe
Description: Sets or queries the state of the video bandwidth (VBW) of the reference channel.
Note: In Real-time operation this sets the VBW state for the reference and all offset channels.
Category: SENSe

title: FILTer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:CHANnel:FILTer
Description: Sets or queries the reference Channel Filter.
Note: In Real-time operation the channel filter is always forced to None.
Category: SENSe

title: IBANdwidth (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:CHANnel:IBANdwidth
Description: Sets or queries the reference channel integration bandwidth.
Category: SENSe

title: WIDTh (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:CHANnel:WIDTh
Description: Sets or queries the reference Channel Filter bandwidth
Category: SENSe

title: CHIPrate (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:CHIPrate
Description: Sets or queries the Chip rate.
Use the [SENSe]:SEM:CHANnel:FILTer command to set the reference Channel Filter to RRC (Root-Raised Cosine).
Note: Applies in Swept operation only.
Category: SENSe

title: RESults (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:CLEar:RESults
Description: Clears the results in the Spectral Emissions Mask measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: FREQuency (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:FREQuency
Description: Sets or queries the measurement frequency.
Category: SENSe

title: SPAN (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:FREQuency:SPAN
Description: Returns the frequency span.
Category: SENSe

title: MFILter (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:MFILter
Description: Sets or queries the shape of the filter.
Category: SENSe

title: REALtime (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:MODE:REALtime
Description: Sets or queries the Real-time SEM measurement mode.
Note: In real-time mode SEM is measured using real-time acquisition data.
Category: SENSe

title: MTYPe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:MTYPe
Description: Sets or queries the measurement type.
Category: SENSe

title: DETection (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet:DETection
Description: Sets or queries the detection settings for all offsets.
Note: In Real-time operation the offset and reference detection settings are forced equal.
Category: SENSe

title: FILTer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:BANDwidth:FILTer
Description: Returns the bandwidth filter setting for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The filter setting is equal to the Resolution Bandwidth
(RBW) value times the number of resolution bandwidths. The parameter <x> represents the row in the Offsets & Limits table.
Category: SENSe

title: RESolution (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:BANDwidth[:RESolution]
Description: Sets or queries the resolution bandwidth for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the
Offsets & Limits table. See the [SENSe]:SEM:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}[:RESolution] command.
Note: In Real-time operation the RBW values for each offset and the reference are set equal to the All Channels RBW setting.
Category: SENSe

title: COUNt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:BANDwidth:RESolution:COUNt
Description: Sets or queries the count of Resolution Bandwidths (RBWs) for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents
the row in the Offsets & Limits table.
Note: In Real-time operation the RBW count is always forced to 1.
Category: SENSe

title: VIDeo (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:BANDwidth:VIDeo
Description: Sets or queries the video bandwidth setting for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the
Offsets & Limits table. See the [SENSe]:SEM:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:VIDeo command.
Note: In Real-time operation the VBW values for each offset and the reference are set equal to the All Channels VBW setting.
Category: SENSe

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:BANDwidth:VIDeo:STATe
Description: Sets or queries the state of the video bandwidth for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in
the Offsets & Limits table. See the [SENSe]:SEM:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:VIDeo:STATe command.
Note: In Real-time operation the VBW state values for each offset and the reference are set equal to the All Channels VBW state
setting.
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:FREQuency:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the start frequency for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the Offsets &
Limits table.
Category: SENSe

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:FREQuency:STOP
Description: Sets or queries the stop frequency for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the Offsets &
Limits table.
Category: SENSe

title: SAME (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:LIMIT:ABSolute:SAME
Description: Sets or queries the state of the limits for the absolute start and stop settings for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter
<x> represents the row in the Offsets & Limits table.
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:LIMIT:ABSolute:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the absolute power start limit for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the
Offsets & Limits table.
Category: SENSe

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:LIMIT:ABSolute:STOP
Description: Sets or queries the absolute power stop limit for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the
Offsets & Limits table
Category: SENSe

title: MASK (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:LIMIT:MASK
Description: Sets or queries the limit mask setting for the specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the
Offsets & Limits table.

title: SAME (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:LIMIT:RELative:SAME
Description: Sets or queries the state of the limits for the relative start and stop settings for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter
<x> represents the row in the Offsets & Limits table.
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:LIMIT:RELative:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the relative power start limit for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the
Offsets & Limits table.
Category: SENSe

title: STOP (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:LIMIT:RELative:STOP
Description: Sets or queries the relative power stop limit for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the
Offsets & Limits table.
Category: SENSe

title: SIDE (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:LIMIT:SIDE
Description: Sets or queries the side of the offset limit for specified row in the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the
Offsets & Limits table.
2404
Category: SENSe

title: STATe (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:OFFSet<x>:STATe
Description: Determines whether to display the specified row of the Offsets & Limits table. The parameter <x> represents the row in the Offsets & Limits
table.
Category: SENSe

title: COUNt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:POINts:COUNt
Description: Sets or queries the maximum number of trace points per range.

Note: In Swept operation this is the number of trace points per range. In Real-time operation it is the number of trace points in the
entire trace.
Category: SENSe

title: PRESet (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:PRESet
Description: Defines the standard protocol settings for the Spectral Emissions Mask measurement.
Note: This is an obsolete command.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:REFerence:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to automatically update the Power Reference in the Spectral Emissions Mask measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: DETection (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:REFerence:DETection
Description: Sets or returns the reference channel detection setting.
Note: In Real-time operation the offset and reference detection settings are forced equal.
Category: SENSe

title: MAGNitude (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:REFerence[:MAGNitude]
Description: Sets or queries the reference power magnitude.
Category: SENSe

title: RRCRolloff (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:RRCRolloff
Description: Sets or queries the filter parameter (roll-off ratio) for the Root Raised Cosine filter.
Note: Applies in Swept operation only.
Category: SENSe

title: AUTO (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:STEP:AUTO
Description: Determines whether to automatically update the center frequency increment/decrement step size in the Spectral Emissions Mask
measurement. The Step value controls the magnitude of each step when using the front panel controls or arrow keys on the keyboard.
Category: SENSe

title: MAGNitude (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:STEP[:MAGNitude]
Description: Sets or queries the step magnitude for the center frequency in the Spectral Emissions Mask measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: DEFinition (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SEM:WIDTh:DEFinition
Description: Sets or queries the offset definition of the measurement type in the Spectral Emissions Mask measurement.
Category: SENSe

title: RESolution (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SGRam[:MEASview<y>]:{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:RESolution
Description: Sets or queries the resolution bandwidth (RBW)
Category: SENSe

body:

body:

{BANDwidth|BWIDth}:VIDeo:STATe OFF.

body:

title: CENTer (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SGRam[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:CENTer
Description: Sets or queries the center frequency in the spectrogram.
Note: The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other with the following relationships: (start frequency) =
(center frequency) - (span)/2 and (stop frequency) = (center frequency) + (span)/2.
Category: SENSe

body:

Category: SENSe

body:

Description: Sets the frequency range to the maximum real-time span in the spectrogram.
Category: SENSe

title: STARt (SENSe)
body:
Command: [SENSe]:SGRam[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STARt
Description: Sets or queries the measurement start frequency (left edge of the graph) in the spectrogram.
The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other. Refer to the
Category: SENSe

body:

[SENSe]:SGRam[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:STEP:AUTO OFF .

[SENSe]:SGRam[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:CENTer command.

SENSe:SGRam[:MEASview<y>]:TIME[:SCALe]:PER:DIVision value.

2438

The parameter <x>=1 to 8 represents the number of sources.

body:

Description: Sets or queries the center frequency in the spectrum measurement.
Note: The center, start and stop frequencies are set interlocking each other with the following relationships: (start frequency) =
(center frequency) - (span)/2 and (stop frequency) = (center frequency) + (span)/2.

body:

[SENSe]:SPECtrum[:MEASview<y>]:FREQuency:CENTer command.
Category: SENSe
