title: TEKEXP:SELECT DEVICE,"<DeviceName>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SELECT DEVICE,"<DeviceName>"
Description: This command sets or queries the device name of the application.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SELECT SUITE,"<SuiteName>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SELECT SUITE,"<SuiteName>"
Description: This command sets or queries the suite name of the application.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SELECT TEST,"<TestName>",<Value>
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SELECT TEST,"<TestName>",<Value>
Description: This command selects or deselects the specified test name of the application.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:VALUE GENERAL,"<ParameterName>","<Value>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:VALUE GENERAL,"<ParameterName>","<Value>"
Description: This command sets or queries the general parameter values of the application. The value depends on the selected parameter name.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:LIST? DEVICE
body:
Command: TEKEXP:LIST? DEVICE
Description: This command queries the list of available devices on the DUT panel as comma separated values.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:LIST? SUITE
body:
Command: TEKEXP:LIST? SUITE
Description: This command queries the list of available suites for the selected device as comma separated values.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:LIST? TEST
body:
Command: TEKEXP:LIST? TEST
Description: This command queries the list of available tests of the application for the selected device as comma separated values.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:LIST? VERSION
body:
Command: TEKEXP:LIST? VERSION
Description: This command queries the list of available version names of the application for the selected device as comma separated values.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:LIST? INSTRUMENT,"<InstrumentType>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:LIST? INSTRUMENT,"<InstrumentType>"
Description: This command queries the list of available instruments based on the specified instrument type.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:INSTRUMENT, "<InstrumentType>","<Value>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:INSTRUMENT, "<InstrumentType>","<Value>"
Description: This command sets or queries the IP address of the instrument based on the specified instrument type.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:INFO? REPORT
body:
Command: TEKEXP:INFO? REPORT
Description: This command queries the information of the generated report file in the format "<FileSize>","<FileName>". A session should be run earlier and the report should be generated to get the information of the report.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:INFO? WFM
body:
Command: TEKEXP:INFO? WFM
Description: This command queries the information of the generated waveform files. If there are more than one waveform, the waveform file names are displayed with the comma separated values.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:INFO? IMAGE
body:
Command: TEKEXP:INFO? IMAGE
Description: This command queries the information of the generated image files. If there are more than one image, the image file names are displayed with the comma separated values.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:*IDN?
body:
Command: TEKEXP:*IDN?
Description: This command queries the active TekExpress application name running on the oscilloscope.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:VALUE DUTID,"<Value>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:VALUE DUTID,"<Value>"
Description: This command sets or queries the DUTID of the application.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:ACQUIRE_MODE <Mode>
body:
Command: TEKEXP:ACQUIRE_MODE <Mode>
Description: This command sets or queries the acquire mode status.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:MODE <Mode>
body:
Command: TEKEXP:MODE <Mode>
Description: This command sets or queries the execution mode status.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:REPORT GENERATE
body:
Command: TEKEXP:REPORT GENERATE
Description: This command generates the report for the current session.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:REPORT? "<Device Field>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:REPORT? "<Device Field>"
Description: This command queries the value of specified report header field in the report. Device field is the header name of each field in the setup information section of the report.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:RESULT? "<TestName>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:RESULT? "<TestName>"
Description: This command queries the value of specified result detail available in report summary/details table. Can be used with 1-3 arguments: TestName only, TestName and ColumnName, or TestName, ColumnName, and RowNumber.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SETUP Default
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SETUP Default
Description: This command restores the setup to default settings.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SETUP Save
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SETUP Save
Description: This command saves the setup.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SETUP Save,"<SessionName>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SETUP Save,"<SessionName>"
Description: This command saves the settings to a specified session.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SETUP Open,"<SessionName>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SETUP Open,"<SessionName>"
Description: This command opens the setup from a specified session.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SETUP? CURRENT
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SETUP? CURRENT
Description: This command queries the current setup file name.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:STATE <operation mode>
body:
Command: TEKEXP:STATE <operation mode>
Description: This command run/stop/pause/resume the selected measurements execution in the application.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:STATE?
body:
Command: TEKEXP:STATE?
Description: This command queries the current measurement execution status.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:STATE? SETUP
body:
Command: TEKEXP:STATE? SETUP
Description: This command queries whether the current setup is saved or not saved.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:EXIT
body:
Command: TEKEXP:EXIT
Description: The command exits or close the application.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:*OPC?
body:
Command: TEKEXP:*OPC?
Description: This command queries whether the previous command execution is completed successfully.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:LASTERROR?
body:
Command: TEKEXP:LASTERROR?
Description: This command queries the last error occurred.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:POPUP "<PopupResponse>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:POPUP "<PopupResponse>"
Description: This command sets or queries the popup details.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:VALUE LIMIT,<TestName>,<LimitHeader>,<Value1>,<CompareString>,<Value2>
body:
Command: TEKEXP:VALUE LIMIT,<TestName>,<LimitHeader>,<Value1>,<CompareString>,<Value2>
Description: This command sets or queries the limit values in the limits editor window.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:VALUE WFMFILE,<TestName>,<AcquireType>,<WaveformFileName>
body:
Command: TEKEXP:VALUE WFMFILE,<TestName>,<AcquireType>,<WaveformFileName>
Description: This command set or queries the waveform file recalled for the specified test name and acquire type. If there are more than one waveform, the waveform file names are displayed with the symbol "$" separated values.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:VALUE VERBOSE,"<Value>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:VALUE VERBOSE,"<Value>"
Description: This command sets or queries the enable/disable status of Verbose function.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:VALUE ContinuousRun,"<Value>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:VALUE ContinuousRun,"<Value>"
Description: This command sets or queries the enable/disable status of Continuous Run function.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:VALUE ContinuousRun_Duration,"<Value>"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:VALUE ContinuousRun_Duration,"<Value>"
Description: This command sets or queries the continuous run duration time value.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:VALUE ContinuousRun_RunSessionOptions,"Value"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:VALUE ContinuousRun_RunSessionOptions,"Value"
Description: This command sets or queries the option for session creation in the continuous run function.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:REPORTASXML?
body:
Command: TEKEXP:REPORTASXML?
Description: This command returns the report as XML string.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:COPYIMAGES <DestinationPath>
body:
Command: TEKEXP:COPYIMAGES <DestinationPath>
Description: This command copies all the images from current run session to the given destination location.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SELECTID <"TestID">
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SELECTID <"TestID">
Description: This command selects the specified test(s) and deselect all other tests. Multiple test IDs can be provided as comma-separated values.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:TESTINFO?
body:
Command: TEKEXP:TESTINFO?
Description: This command returns the complete information about the selected test. The information includes application name, TestID, Device selected, Suite selected, version, Test name, Test description.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SESSION DEFAULT
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SESSION DEFAULT
Description: Sets the application configurations to default value.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SESSION SAVE,"Session Name"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SESSION SAVE,"Session Name"
Description: Enter the name to save/config the session.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SESSION LOAD, "Session Name"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SESSION LOAD, "Session Name"
Description: Load the selected config/run session.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SESSION DELETE, "Session1, Session2"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SESSION DELETE, "Session1, Session2"
Description: Deletes the selected config/run session.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SESSION RUN, "Session Name's separated by comma"
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SESSION RUN, "Session Name's separated by comma"
Description: Run the selected config/run session.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SESSION? LIST
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SESSION? LIST
Description: Returns the list of available config/run session.
Category: tekexpress

title: TEKEXP:SESSION? CURRENT
body:
Command: TEKEXP:SESSION? CURRENT
Description: Returns the selected config/run session.
Category: tekexpress
